The improved summary adds the action verb 'Validate' and clarifies the subject (DDA account). data.summary_suggestion: Validate DDA account eligibility for ACH transactions
data.description_suggestion: Validates whether a Demand Deposit Account (DDA) is eligible to participate in ACH (Automated Clearing House) transactions. Accepts account details including account number, routing number, account type, and account holder information. Returns validation status and eligibility determination. This operation performs real-time account validation against ACH network requirements and does not modify account state.
